protein_name: Regulates the GDP/GTP exchange reaction of the Rho proteins by inhibiting the dissociation of GDP from them, and the subsequent binding of GTP to them. Regulates reorganization of the actin cytoskeleton mediated by Rho family members. Belongs to the Rho GDI family. Detected in bone marrow, thymus and spleen. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
